title: Data for the paper titled 'Dynamic Molecular Atlas for Cardiac Fibrosis at Single-Cell and Spatial Resolution: CD248 in Orchestrating Fibroblast-Immune Interaction'
author: Hu, Xinyang
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The deposited data were employed to generate the figures concerning single-cell RNA (scRNA) and spatial transcriptomic analyses in the paper titled 'Dynamic Molecular Atlas for Cardiac Fibrosis at Single-Cell and Spatial Resolution: CD248 in Orchestrating Fibroblast-Immune Interaction'.
steps_raw: The deposited data were employed to generate the figures concerning single-cell RNA (scRNA) and spatial transcriptomic analyses in the paper titled 'Dynamic Molecular Atlas for Cardiac Fibrosis at Single-Cell and Spatial Resolution: CD248 in Orchestrating Fibroblast-Immune Interaction'.
